update.checkingDescription: Looking for the latest Yishan version...
update.availableDescription: Download the update when you're ready. Yishan will not restart until you confirm.
update.downloadingDescription: Keep Yishan open while the update downloads.
update.readyDescription: Restart Yishan when you're ready to apply the update. Terminal sessions will keep running.
update.upToDateDescription: You're already running the latest version.
